pi_items.source: Direct web access test - website is accessible and real
Extracted from target_url - correct domain name
Official Screaming Frog documentation (https://www.screamingfrog.co.uk/seo-spider/user-guide/tabs/) specifies column names as 'h2-length-1/2', which formats in CSV as 'H2-Length-1' and 'H2-Length-2'
books.toscrape.com has approximately 20 pages total (1000+ books across ~20 pages per search results on GitHub datasets and scraping projects)
Task template path - directory structure created by setup_task.sh, but actual report creation depends on agent task execution

privileged_info_summary: The task targets books.toscrape.com, a real public website designed for web scraping practice, containing approximately 20 pages total. Screaming Frog's H2 tab exports the following verified columns: Address, Occurrences, H2-1, H2-2, H2-Length-1, H2-Length-2, Indexability, and Indexability Status. The minimum CSV row count of 20 aligns with the website's approximately 20-page structure. However, the claimed required column 'H2 Length 1' is contradicted by official Screaming Frog documentation, which specifies the correct format as 'H2-Length-1' (with hyphens, not spaces).
